title: Sven's Venture
description: 1.20.1 | A modpack that aims to add and overhaul the vanilla experience
body:
**Sven's Venture** is a modpack that aims to improve already existing features whilst adding new content to the game.

- 🌲 | Explore new biomes with *Terralith*, *Geophilic* and *YUNG's Cave Biomes*
- 🏰 | Find new structures like taverns with *Dungeons and Taverns*
- ⚔️ | Fight challenging bosses with *L_Ender's Cataclysm*
- 🗝️ | Find rare artifacts with *Ancient Forgemastery*
- 🚀 | Explore the vastness of space with *Ad Astra*
- 🏹 | Revamped archery system with *Archery Expansion*
- 🔥 | 22 new Nether biomes with *Better Nether*
- 🌌 | 19 new End biomes with *Better End* and *Endergetic Expansion*
- 👻 | A brand new sculk dimension with *Deeper and Darker*
- ⬆️ | And tons more!

It is still currently in development, so if you want to add a mod or a new feature, **you can join our discord server!**
